dialog: Yes! Look how beautiful my curve is! It follows all the points! It is... wait...
What is happening? Purple test dots are arriving and you are missing them all!
Those purple dots... new and never seen! My beautiful ultra-precise curve is totally useless out here!
Oh no! You have memorized the old points perfectly, but you cannot predict the new ones! This is what Master Bias meant. I'm going straight back to Doc Epoch!
